# Phase Ownership Matrix Template

| Required Output | Owning Phase | Evidence Expectation | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| Dockerfile baseline | Foundations and Dockerfile Baseline | Dockerfile template + source mapping | Not Started |
| Build optimization | BuildKit and Optimization | Build command and cache notes | Not Started |
| Compose workflow | Compose Workflows | Compose template + validation notes | Not Started |
| Security and supply chain | Security and Supply Chain | Scan report + SBOM output | Not Started |
| Integration tests | Testcontainers and Integration Testing | Fixture pattern + run output | Not Started |
| CI gates | CI/CD and Promotion Gates | Pipeline template + gate checks | Not Started |
| Source freshness | Source Curation and Freshness | Source ledger updated | Not Started |
| Quality decision | Quality Gate and Review Readiness | Findings table + disposition | Not Started |
